scripts.setup: pnpm --dir apps/api install --lockfile=false && pnpm --dir apps/mobile install --lockfile=false
scripts.dev:api: pnpm run ensure:api && pnpm --dir apps/api dev
scripts.dev:mobile: pnpm run ensure:mobile && pnpm --dir apps/mobile dev
scripts.agent: sh -c 'VIDEO="$(pwd)/clips/safety_car.mov"; (open -a "QuickTime Player" "$VIDEO" >/dev/null 2>&1 || open "$VIDEO" >/dev/null 2>&1); sleep 0.4; osascript -e "tell application \"QuickTime Player\" to if exists front document then play front document" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apps/vision-agent/.venv/bin/python -u apps/vision-agent/run_agent.py --source "$VIDEO" --session-id realtime_live_with_video --api-base-url http://127.0.0.1:4000 --sample-fps 2 --realtime-file --playback-rate 1.0'
